Calculate a mean with empty-vector protection

Source: R/primary_metrics_calculation_helper.R
safe_mean.Rd

Returns the mean of a numeric vector while ignoring missing values. If the input vector has length zero, the function returns NA_real_.

Usage

safe_mean(x)

Arguments

x

A numeric vector.

Value

A numeric value.

On this page
